mapper.sql:
SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , INFO.DEPTNM , INFO.USERNM , STD.USER_ID , A.SBMSN_TYCD , A.TEAM_ID , A.SBMSN_CTS , A.SCR , A.SBMSN_STSCD , ( SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ASMNT_SUBMIT_CD' AND CD = A.SBMSN_STSCD AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ASMNT_SUBMIT_STATUS_NM , A.SBMSN_CNT , A.CNTN_IP , A.EVLYN , A.SCR_MEMO , A.DELYN , A.EXLN_ASMTYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.MDFR_ID AS FILE_RGTR_ID , B.MOD_DTTM AS FILE_REG_DTTM , ( SELECT T.teamnm FROM TB_LMS_TEAM T WHERE T.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID) AS teamnm , ( SELECT T.ROLE FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR T WHERE T.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID AND T.STD_ID = A.STD_ID ) AS ROLE , ( SELECT IFNULL(AVG(T.SCR),0) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL T WHERE T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND T.RGTR_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N' AND ( ASMNT.TEAM_EVAL_YN = 'N' OR (ASMNT.TEAM_EVAL_YN = 'Y' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR WHERE TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID AND USER_ID = TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT.USER_ID)) ) ) ) AS EVL_SCR , ( SELECT COUNT(RGTR_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL T WHERE T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND T.RGTR_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N' AND ( ASMNT.TEAM_EVAL_YN = 'N' OR (ASMNT.TEAM_EVAL_YN = 'Y' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR WHERE TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID AND USER_ID = TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT.USER_ID)) ) ) ) AS EVAL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(ASMT_FDBK_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMNT_FDBK WHERE ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) AS FDBK_CNT , (SELECT FILENM FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID LIMIT 1) AS FILENM , (SELECT CONCAT(FILE_PATH, '/', FILE_SAVENM) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID LIMIT 1) AS FILE_PATH , (SELECT CONCAT(FILE_PATH, '/', THMB_FILE_PATH) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND (THMB_FILE_PATH IS NOT NULL AND THMB_FILE_PATH != '') ORDER BY FILE_ID LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH , (SELECT FILE_EXTNM FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID LIMIT 1) AS FILE_EXTNM , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) AS FILE_CNT , STD.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = STD.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD' AND CD = STD.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD) AS GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT STD ON STD.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND STD.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND STD.AUDITYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT LOGIN ON STD.USER_ID = LOGIN.USER_ID AND LOGIN.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' JOIN TB_LMS_USR INFO ON STD.USER_ID = INFO.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT ASMNT ON A.ASMT_ID = ASMNT.ASMT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMNT_SBMT_FILE B ON A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID WHERE A.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT','RE')
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' AND A.RESEND_YN = 'Y'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' AND A.RESEND_YN = 'N'
AND A.EVLYN = 'Y'
AND A.EVLYN = 'N'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = #{searchKey}
AND A.TEAM_ID = #{searchKey2}
AND ( LOWER( INFO.DEPTNM ) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER( INFO.USER_ID ) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER( INFO.USERNM ) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : AsmntProTeamDAO.selectList 설 명 : 다건 조회 */ SELECT RT.*
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.TEAM_ID, RT.ROLE DESC, RT.USER_ID) AS LINE_NO
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.TEAM_ID, RT.ROLE DESC, (CASE WHEN RT.FILE_REG_DTTM IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), RT.FILE_REG_DTTM) AS LINE_NO
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.TEAM_ID, RT.ROLE DESC, RT.USERNM) AS LINE_NO
, COUNT(RT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT
ORDER BY RT.TEAM_ID, RT.ROLE DESC, RT.USER_ID
ORDER BY RT.TEAM_ID, RT.ROLE DESC, (CASE WHEN RT.FILE_REG_DTTM IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), RT.FILE_REG_DTTM
ORDER BY RT.TEAM_ID, RT.ROLE DESC, RT.USERNM

/* SQL ID : AsmntProTeamDAO.selectListPaging 설 명 : 페이징 */ SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT ORDER BY RT.TEAM_ID, RT.USERNM LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{listScale}
/* SQL ID : AsmntProTeamDAO.selectTeamList 설 명 : 팀 목록 조회 */ SELECT TEAM_TYCD , TEAM_ID , teamnm FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_TYCD = #{lrnGrpId}

/* SQL ID : AsmntProTeamDAO.selectTarget 설 명 : 과제 대상자 조회 */ SELECT ATNDLC.ATNDLC_ID , ATNDLC.USER_ID , USR.USERNM , MBR.TEAM_ID , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID) AS DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM TEAM ON TEAM.LRN_GRP_ID = #{lrnGrpId} JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR MBR ON MBR.TEAM_ID = TEAM.TEAM_ID AND MBR.USER_ID = ATNDLC.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON USR.USER_ID = ATNDLC.USER_ID WHERE ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND ATNDLC.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC'
